title: Bugsnag Build
description: Represents a build or deployment notification sent to the Bugsnag Build API, containing version information, source control details, and optional metadata.

apiKey.description: The Bugsnag API key for the project.

appVersion.description: The version of the application being built or deployed.

appVersionCode.description: The version code of the application, typically used for Android applications.

appBundleVersion.description: The bundle version of the application, typically used for iOS applications.

releaseStage.description: The release stage for this build (e.g., production, staging, development).

builderName.description: The name of the person or system that created this build.

metadata.description: Custom metadata to associate with the build.

autoAssignRelease.description: Whether to automatically assign this build as a release.

SourceControl.description: Source control information for the build, linking errors to specific commits and repositories.

repository.description: The URL of the source control repository.

revision.description: The source control revision or commit hash for this build.

diff.description: A URL to the diff between this build and the previous one.
